meaning: n.比,比率,[财政]复本位制中金银的法定比价
examples: The adult to child ratio is one to six.
The school has a very high teacher-student ratio.
What is the ratio of men to women in the department?
Normally, a ratio of bond yield to earnings yield of 1.0 is considered cheap.
All the acquisitions mean a high debt-to-capital ratio of 49%, versus 35% for peers.
